bounded_question: How should course jurisdiction, racing authority, racing-code context and betting-market interpretation be represented without treating international source fields as universally equivalent?

escalation_levels: jurisdiction, racing code and effective period
classification_method.escalation_rule: Add deeper context only when the planned analysis, historical change or observed source behaviour requires it.
classification_method.unresolved_rule: Preserve the source value and leave researched interpretation unassigned rather than forcing a classification.

great_britain.finding: One principal authority covers several materially distinct racing-code contexts.
great_britain.remaining_issue: Detailed rules-version segmentation remains a later study.

ireland.finding: Authority role, racing code and historical period must remain distinct.

france.preservation_rule: Retain source type NH Flat unchanged and record the interpretation question separately.

information_layers.source: Exact provider-supplied values and physical lineage.
information_layers.structural_derivation: Reproducible candidate identities, jurisdiction and parsed source representations.
information_layers.research_interpretation: Evidence-backed authority, native code, rules period, wagering context and source-to-native mappings.

required_before_reconstruction: Retain source type exactly as supplied.
Preserve raw sp and interpret market meaning separately.
deferred_research_enrichment: Authority and rules records with effective periods.
Unresolved interpretation questions and later resolutions.

decisions: Do not overwrite source racing type with a researched interpretation.
Do not treat source type as a universal native racing code.
Do not treat raw sp as one globally comparable market measure.
Store candidate jurisdiction as a reproducible structural derivation.
Keep regulatory, administrative and racing-code roles distinct.
Use effective-period records only where historical change requires them.
Defer detailed country research until a country-specific or analytical study requires it.
Track unresolved research questions without forcing classifications.
Do not design the final target schema in this notebook.
